nodes.label: AI as structural guide and thinking partner
nodes.grounding_span: it did help to put my mind in the right place to create content

nodes.label: AI for low-risk, bounded tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI for high-risk, unbounded content generation
nodes.grounding_span: saying 'reply to [REDACTED] and tell him I'm free on Friday' is an acceptable direct output

nodes.label: AI as augmenter of human abilities
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement of human role
nodes.grounding_span: use AI as an assistant, augmenting your abilities, than using it to replace aspects of your role

nodes.label: Preservation of human tone and personality
nodes.grounding_span: preserve your tone of voice and personality, and not let it be lost to generic, and obvious, AI generated content

nodes.label: AI reliability and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: taking a small prompt and generating larger content is just asking for trouble with hallucinations and inaccuracies

nodes.label: AI as upskilling tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as crutch that degrades skills
nodes.grounding_span: using AI to generate code, then I'm also going to be using it to train me on that code

nodes.label: Authentic expertise and competence
nodes.grounding_span: ensure that technical content is clearly reviewed by the technical team to ensure we portray ourselves in an accurate manner

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: automate routine tasks and to free me up for higher level functions

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as structural guide
nodes.grounding_span: I found it deeply satisfying to be able to compare our existing processes against industry standards

nodes.label: Frustration with AI-generated inaccuracies
nodes.grounding_span: This document included many inaccurate details regarding our CI/CD process, which led to embarrassing conversations

nodes.label: Cautious trust in AI for bounded tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I won't use any content directly without ensuring I fully understand it, for anything that has a critical business function

nodes.label: Optimism about AI freeing up higher-level work
nodes.grounding_span: I love the idea that AI can take over specific skills and functions of our roles - this gives more time to higher level strategy

nodes.label: Strategic conversation framing to counteract AI bias
nodes.grounding_span: I'll start by asking what industry standard techniques would be common to a particular task, and then ask for pros and cons of different approaches

nodes.label: Iterative refinement and sense-checking
nodes.grounding_span: I would then feed this back to the AI model for sense checking
